title: Expanded Delight PT-BR Translation (Unofficial)
description: Unofficial translation for Expanded Delight in PT-BR (Brazillian Portuguese)
body:
Resourcepack to translate the mod Expanded Delight to brazillian portugese. This translation is unofficial, but mod developers are welcome to use them in their mods officially. This is licensed on Creative Commons 4.0

**Installation:**

*   Download the zip file
*   Go to your .minecraft and find the resourcepack folder
*   Move the zip to the resourcepacks folder
*   Apply the resourcepack in game
*   Set your in game language to PT-BR

![Tutorial of language order in game](https://i.ibb.co/13gcZM8/image.webp)

This project was made using tools by Hispanic Translation Team
